name: claude-toolshed
description: Eigenwise's toolshed of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: codebase-mapper
plugins.description: Self-maintaining, language-agnostic codebase map. Generates atomic docs in .claude/.codebase-info/, re-injects them on every prompt via a UserPromptSubmit hook, and keeps them in sync as the code changes. Works on greenfield or existing projects, any stack.

plugins.name: live-rules
plugins.description: Developer-friendly live rules for Claude Code. Drop atomic Markdown rule files in .claude/rules/ and a pair of hooks inject the ones that apply, right when they apply: global and prompt-keyword rules on every prompt, path/glob and directory rules right before Claude edits a matching file. Read fresh each time, so edits take effect on the next prompt with no restart.
